activation.reason: V9 completes the dogfood loop, but users still need one stable product command surface for status, doctor checks, release commands, and resume guidance.

assumptions.claim: The first product packaging slice should be read-only and stdlib-only.
assumptions.verification: The CLI must not execute workflow stages, mutate source files, invoke network services, install dependencies, or call external runtimes.

assumptions.claim: A useful product surface can be built before a plugin or dashboard.
assumptions.verification: Expose status, doctor, and command-discovery commands that read existing V1-V9 artifacts and are covered by release checks.

budget.file_touch_limit: one new product CLI, one V10 plan, one V10 spec, one decision doc, README, roadmap, and release contract updates

first_slice.completion_check: python scripts/dwm.py doctor --json reports ok true and final dogfood status workflow-complete
first_slice.expected_output: A read-only DWM CLI with status, doctor, commands, and self-test modes
first_slice.instruction: Package the existing deterministic artifact chain behind a stable repo-local CLI that reports state and command guidance without running the workflow.

objective: Make DWM usable as a durable repo-local product surface by adding a read-only CLI that summarizes status, health, release commands, and resume guidance over the V1-V9 artifact chain.

parallelism.fan_in_rule: No parallel fan-in in the first slice; product packaging reads one canonical dogfood chain.

exit_criteria: status command reads an owned run directory
phases.name: Status Surface

exit_criteria: doctor command checks required scripts and docs
doctor command reports final dogfood status
phases.name: Doctor Surface

exit_criteria: release commands include the DWM CLI self-test
contract checks validate V10 docs and CLI output
phases.name: Contract Update

exit_criteria: docs/v10-decision.md records keep with generated CLI values
quick validation and release checks pass
phases.name: Release Decision

risk_gates.safe_default: stop before writing and ask for approval
stop before shell use and ask for approval
stop before network use and ask for approval

source_prompt: Package DWM so it is usable as a real tool after V9 completes the dogfood workflow.

verification.claim_or_output: The product CLI reports the canonical V9 dogfood completion state.
verification.falsifier: The CLI reports workflow-complete without matching the V9 status artifact.

verification.claim_or_output: The product CLI is read-only and does not execute the workflow.
verification.falsifier: The CLI invokes workflow stage scripts, writes out artifacts, calls network services, or installs dependencies.

verification.claim_or_output: The product packaging docs match the implemented CLI.
verification.falsifier: README, roadmap, or decision docs claim commands or completion states the CLI cannot report.

stop_conditions: CLI would need to execute workflow stages
CLI would need external runtime integration
docs cannot be made consistent with implementation
